title: DecisionCard
description: Records a research/triage decision about a BeliefCard, gated by deterministic checks and (optionally) human approval. Research-only: a DecisionCard NEVER places, modifies, or cancels an order, moves funds, or changes a position. allowed_decision_label values are triage states only. See docs/safety_policy.md, docs/maker_checker_policy.md, docs/promotion_policy.md.

schema_version.description: Version of this schema the record conforms to.

decision_id.description: Stable unique id for this decision record.

belief_card_id.description: object_id / id of the BeliefCard this decision concerns.

allowed_decision_label.description: The research/triage outcome. These are the ONLY approved labels and are observational, not directives: none authorize buy, sell, trade, order, entry, or exit.

rationale.description: Why this label was assigned, tied to evidence and checks.

deterministic_checks.description: Rule-based checks that gate the decision (the maker's reproducible criteria).

ai_review_summary.description: Optional summary from an automated (checker) review pass. Advisory only; does not substitute for human approval where required.

human_decision.description: Optional human adjudication of this decision.

decided_by.description: Reviewer identifier. No personal financial account data.

approval_required.description: Whether explicit human approval is required before this decision is relied upon.

prohibited_actions_confirmed.description: Safety attestation that MUST be true for a valid DecisionCard: this record triggers NO prohibited action. It does not buy, sell, trade, place/modify/cancel an order, set an entry or exit, or move funds. Research-only by construction (see docs/safety_policy.md).
